---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, enhancement, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a specific Trilium ETAPI endpoint, a missing MCP capability, or a workflow you're trying to enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. If it's a new tool, suggest a name, inputs, and what it should return.

## ETAPI endpoint (if applicable)

If this maps to a specific Trilium ETAPI endpoint, link to it or paste the method and path (e.g. `POST /etapi/attachments`).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Links, references to Trilium docs, related issues, or anything else that would help.
